claims.quote: The Pharmacy Student Summer Externship Program at Houston Methodist Hospital is a six-week, non-compensated, hands-on experience designed to provide an introduction to hospital-based pharmacy for students enrolled in a Doctor of Pharmacy program who have completed their first or second year.
claims.claimText: Page is a Pharmacy (PharmD) Student Summer Externship, not a physician/medical-student USCE program. Content does not match the /observership URL's implied lane.
claims.limitations: Page family was classified OBSERVERSHIP_PAGE but content describes a PharmD externship for P1/P2 pharmacy students, not a physician/IMG observership or visiting medical student rotation. Out of USCE scope; flag for A2 review.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required
